Collection.title: Data Collection
Collection.description: The process of gathering data from various sources

Acquisition.title: Acquisition
Acquisition.definition: Actively obtaining data through various means, including user input, sensor collection, API calls, etc.

Importation.title: Importation
Importation.definition: Importing existing data from external systems or files into the current system

Transmission.title: Data Transmission
Transmission.description: The process of transferring data between different systems or nodes

Despatch.title: Despatch
Despatch.definition: Sending data from the local system to remote systems or other nodes

Reception.title: Reception
Reception.definition: Receiving data from remote systems or other nodes to the local system

Storage.title: Data Storage
Storage.description: Saving data in storage media for subsequent use

Persistence.title: Persistence
Persistence.definition: Writing data from memory to persistent storage media (such as databases, file systems)

Archive.title: Archive
Archive.definition: Moving infrequently used historical data to long-term storage media

Backup.title: Backup
Backup.definition: Creating data copies to prevent data loss or corruption

Processing.title: Data Processing
Processing.description: The process of processing, analyzing and presenting data

Calculation.title: Calculation
Calculation.definition: Performing operations, analysis, transformation and other processing on data

Display.title: Display
Display.definition: Presenting data to users in visual or other forms

Exchange.title: Data Exchange
Exchange.description: The process of sharing or transferring data with third parties

Sharing.title: Sharing
Sharing.definition: Sharing data usage rights with other organizations or individuals

Delegation.title: Delegation
Delegation.definition: Delegating data processing tasks to third-party service providers

Exportation.title: Exportation
Exportation.definition: Transferring data overseas or cross-border transmission

Destruction.title: Data Destruction
Destruction.description: The process of permanently deleting or destroying data

Deletion.title: Deletion
Deletion.definition: Deleting data from the system so that it cannot be accessed normally

Cancellation.title: Cancellation
Cancellation.definition: Deactivating user accounts and deleting all related personal data
